data.title: Sioux Honey Co-op and Hy-Vee donate 3 tons (6,000 lbs) of honey to Kansas City nonprofits, delivering sweetness.
data.description: Sioux Honey Co-op, in partnership with Hy-Vee grocery stores, recently made a significant donation of over 6,000 pounds of honey to two Kansas City-based nonprofits. This generous contribution was delivered in September 2025 and aimed to support the local community. The collaboration between Sioux Honey Co-op and Hy-Vee grocery stores highlights their commitment to giving back and supporting organizations in need.

data.title: Angelalign Technologies (6699.HK) stays confident despite rival ALGN's new complaint; Angel defends against the allegation.
data.description: In San Clemente, California, on September 24, 2025, Angelalign Technology Inc. (6699.HK), also known as Angel, expresses steadfast confidence amidst industry giant Align Technology Inc. (ALGN) filing a new baseless lawsuit against them in the U.S. The company stands firm in its position despite this legal challenge.

data.title: MBX Biosciences upsizes public offering, prices 11,108,055 shares at $18 each, expects $199.9M in gross proceeds.
data.description: CARMEL, Indiana, September 24, 2025 - MBX Biosciences, Inc. (Nasdaq: MBX), a leading clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company that specializes in developing innovative precision peptide therapies for endocrine and metabolic disorders, revealed the pricing of its larger public offering. The company is offering 11,108,055 shares of common stock at $18.00 per share to the public, expecting to generate approximately $199.9 million in gross proceeds, excluding underwriting expenses. MBX Biosciences is the sole provider of these shares and has granted underwriters a 30-day option to purchase up to 1,666,208 additional shares at the same price less discounts. The offering is set to close on September 26, 2025, pending standard closing requirements.

data.title: Couche-Tard prices private offerings of US$1.2 billion senior unsecured notes, consists of two tranches.
data.description: In Laval, Quebec on September 24, 2025, Alimentation Couche-Tard Inc. revealed details of a private debt offering. The offering consists of two tranches of US dollar denominated senior unsecured notes, with a total value of US$1.2 billion. This announcement was made by Couche-Tard, listed on the Toronto Stock Exchange under the symbol ATD.
